summary.text: A
is a container that supports random access to elements, constant time removal of elements at the end, and linear time insertion and removal of elements at the beginning or in the middle.

segments.text: The number of elements in a
may vary dynamically; memory management is automatic. The memory associated with a
resides in the memory accessible to devices.

methods.name: resize

summary.text: Resizes this vector to the specified number of elements.

segments.text: This method will resize this vector to the specified number of elements. If the number is smaller than this vector's current size this vector is truncated, otherwise this vector is extended and new elements are populated with given data.

description.text: Number of elements this vector should contain.
Data with which new elements should be populated.
